name: ICICI Bank Coral RuPay Credit Card
exclusions: transactions excluded under ICICI Bank reward programme terms
UPI is only for merchant payments and restricted categories apply
milestoneBenefits: 2,000 reward points on spending Rs 2,00,000 and 1,000 reward points each time Rs 1,00,000 spend is crossed thereafter in an anniversary year, capped at 10,000 points per year
additionalBenefits: 25% discount on BookMyShow and INOX movie tickets capped at Rs 100 twice a month
RuPay network support for UPI linking

salaried: Age 21 years and above, monthly income Rs 20,000 and above
selfEmployed: Age 21 years and above, eligibility is subject to ICICI Bank approval criteria
